title: Choose analysis mode upfront
story: As a framework user, I want to choose whether to run my analysis with personas or without, so that I control how my analysis is conducted.
acceptance_criteria: AC-001-01: Framework presents two options: with personas or straight analysis
AC-001-02: No personas = no persona files loaded, no persona influence
AC-001-04: Question is conversational, not a numbered menu

title: Choose conversation style
story: As a framework user, I want to choose the conversation style (conversational, bulleted, silent) when using personas, so that I get the output format I prefer.
acceptance_criteria: AC-002-01: Three options presented
AC-002-02: Config preference shown as default
AC-002-03: Choice applies for entire session

title: Curate persona roster
story: As a framework user, I want to add or remove any persona from the recommended roster including the primary personas, so that I get exactly the perspectives I need.
acceptance_criteria: AC-003-02: Primary personas recommended but not forced
AC-003-05: User can add or remove any persona
AC-003-06: Removing all personas falls back to no-persona mode

title: Run analysis without personas
story: As a framework user, I want to run a straight analysis that produces all standard artifacts without any persona influence, so that I can get a clean analysis when I don't need multi-perspective review.
acceptance_criteria: AC-004-01: No persona files loaded
AC-004-03: All standard artifacts produced
AC-004-05: Meta.json records analysis_mode

title: Remove primary persona from roster
story: As a framework customizer, I want to remove Maya, Alex, or Jordan from a roundtable session, so that I can run analysis with only the perspectives I find valuable.
acceptance_criteria: AC-005-01: PRIMARY_PERSONAS no longer forces inclusion
AC-005-02: Agent references 'active personas' not 'three personas'
AC-005-04: First-exchange rule adapts to active roster

title: Preferences pre-populate choices
story: As a framework user, I want my roundtable.yaml preferences to pre-populate the mode selection so I don't have to re-enter the same choices every time, while still being asked.
acceptance_criteria: AC-006-01: Verbosity pre-selected from config
AC-006-02: Default personas pre-populate recommendation
AC-006-04: Existing configs continue working

title: Learn how to create personas
story: As a framework customizer, I want documentation explaining how to create, override, and configure personas, so that I can extend the analysis with my own domain expertise.
acceptance_criteria: AC-007-01: Covers creating from Domain Expert template
AC-007-02: Covers overriding built-in personas
AC-007-05: Covers frontmatter schema
